properties.description: Exports the DD report for the 3 homes that bank with Barclays. Saves to container which is monitored by a logic app, which will save to share point.

sqlReaderQuery.value:
WITH DirectDebitData AS (
	SELECT 
		CONCAT(RTRIM(Contact_Hd_Res.Forenames), ' ', RTRIM(Contact_Hd_Res.Surname)) AS [Debtor Name],
		REPLACE(CASE
			WHEN DirectD_Dt.BkSortCode != '' THEN
				DirectD_Dt.BkSortCode
			ELSE
				isnull(Contact_Hd_FS.BkSortCode, space(8))
		END, '-', '') AS [Debtor Sort Code],
		CASE
			WHEN DirectD_Dt.BankAcc != '' THEN
				RTRIM(DirectD_Dt.BankAcc)
			ELSE
				RTRIM(FundSrc_Hd.BankAcc)
		END AS [Debtor Account Number],
		RTRIM(Resident.Res_Code) AS [Collection Details],
		DirectD_Dt.Amount,
		CAST(DirectD_Dt.Amount AS NUMERIC(18, 2)) AS [Debtor Amount],
		CASE 
			WHEN DirectD_Dt.DDTranType = '17' THEN '17 - Standard Ongoing Collection'
			WHEN DirectD_Dt.DDTranType = '01' THEN '01 - First Collection'
			WHEN DirectD_Dt.DDTranType = '18' THEN '18 - '
			WHEN DirectD_Dt.DDTranType = '19' THEN '19 - '
			ELSE DirectD_Dt.DDTranType
		END AS [Transaction Type],

		DirectD_Dt.DDHd_Ref,
		DirectD_Dt.DDDT_REF,
		DirectD_Dt.DUE_DATE
	FROM 
		DirectD_Dt (NOLOCK)
		JOIN DirectD_Hd (NOLOCK)
			ON DirectD_Hd.DDHd_Ref = DirectD_Dt.DDHd_Ref
			   AND DirectD_Hd.BatchNo
			   BETWEEN 0 AND 9999999999
		JOIN FundSrc_Hd (NOLOCK)
			LEFT JOIN Contact_Dt AS Contact_Dt_FS (NOLOCK)
				JOIN Contact_Hd AS Contact_Hd_FS (NOLOCK)
					ON Contact_Hd_FS.Contact_Ref = Contact_Dt_FS.Contact_Ref
				ON Contact_Dt_FS.Cnta_Det_Ref = FundSrc_Hd.Bank_Det_Ref
			JOIN Resident (NOLOCK)
				JOIN Contact_Dt AS Contact_Dt_Res (NOLOCK)
					JOIN Contact_Hd AS Contact_Hd_Res (NOLOCK)
						ON Contact_Hd_Res.Contact_Ref = Contact_Dt_Res.Contact_Ref
					ON Contact_Dt_Res.Cnta_Det_Ref = Resident.Cnta_Det_Ref
				JOIN Room_Dt (NOLOCK)
					JOIN Locations (NOLOCK)
						JOIN Site (NOLOCK)
							ON Site.Site_Ref = Locations.Site_Ref
						ON Locations.Loc_Ref = Room_Dt.Loc_Ref
					ON Room_Dt.Room_Ref = Resident.Room_Ref
				ON Resident.Res_Ref = FundSrc_Hd.Res_Ref
			ON FundSrc_Hd.FS_Ref = DirectD_Dt.FS_Ref
	WHERE 
		DirectD_Dt.Due_Date
		BETWEEN '17530101' AND '29991231'
		AND DirectD_Dt.Allocated != 'X'
		and DirectD_Dt.Submitted IS NULL
		and DirectD_Dt.DDTranType IN ( '01', '17', '18', '19' )
		AND Locations.Site_Ref = @{item().Site_ref}
)
SELECT 
	DirectDebitData.[Debtor Name],
	DirectDebitData.[Debtor Sort Code],
	DirectDebitData.[Debtor Account Number],
	DirectDebitData.[Collection Details],
	SUM(DirectDebitData.[Debtor Amount]) AS [Debtor Amount],
	DirectDebitData.[Transaction Type]

	--,DirectDebitData.DUE_DATE
FROM
	DirectDebitData
--WHERE
--	DirectDebitData.[Collection Details] = 'MM0182'
GROUP BY
	DirectDebitData.DDHd_Ref,
	DirectDebitData.DUE_DATE,
	DirectDebitData.[Debtor Name],
	DirectDebitData.[Debtor Sort Code],
	DirectDebitData.[Debtor Account Number],
	DirectDebitData.[Collection Details],
	DirectDebitData.[Transaction Type]

Then Delete the csv file.

SELECT
	HomeID, 
    IntranetID,
	Homename, 
	ExchCode
FROM 
	Avery.HomeDetails
WHERE
	ExchCode IS NOT NULL
	AND ExchCode != 'KETT01' --Doesnt exist in Exchequer
ORDER BY	 
	HomeId ASC

properties.description: The Details (Ledger) from Exchequer for the current financial year

activities.name: Company List and current period
activities.description: List company codes and current period details, including the current exchequer year to be used in refreshing the details data

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @Today AS DATE = GETDATE()
DECLARE @CurrentPeriod AS DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@Today), MONTH(@Today), 1)

SELECT 
	HomeID, 
    IntranetID,
	Homename, 
	ExchCode,
    CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo,
    CompanyPeriods.CalendarFullDescription
FROM 
	Avery.HomeDetails

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = HomeDetails.ExchCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate = @CurrentPeriod
WHERE
	ExchCode IS NOT NULL
	AND ExchCode != 'KETT01' --Doesnt exist in Exchequer
ORDER BY
	HomeId ASC

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT
	'@{item().ExchCode}' AS ExchCompanyCode
	,'@{item().HomeID}' AS HomeID
	,'@{item().IntranetID}' AS IntranetID
	,'@{item().Homename}' AS Homename
	,L.[tlFolioNum]
	,L.[tlLineNo]
	,L.[tlRunNo]
	,L.[tlGLCode]
	,L.[tlNominalMode]
	,L.[tlCurrency]
	,L.[tlYear]
	,L.[tlPeriod]
	,L.[tlDepartment]
	,L.[tlCostCentre]
	,L.[tlDocType]
	,L.[tlQty]
	,L.[tlQtyMul]
	,L.[tlNetValue]
	,L.[tlDiscount]
	,L.[tlVATCode]
	,L.[tlVATAmount]
	,L.[tlPaymentCode]
	,L.[tlOldPBal]
	,L.[tlRecStatus]
	,L.[tlDiscFlag]
	,L.[tlQtyWOFF]
	,L.[tlQtyDel]
	,L.[tlCost]
	,L.[tlAcCode]
	,L.[tlLineDate]
	,L.[tlItemNo]
	,L.[tlDescription]
	,L.[tlJobCode]
	,L.[tlAnalysisCode]
	,L.[tlOurRef]
	,L.[tlPreviousBalance]
	,L.[PositionId] AS DetailsPositionId
	,H.thYourRef
	,H.thLongYourRefTrans
	,H.thOurRef
	,H.thPostedDate
	,H.thCreationDate
	,H.thDueDate
	,H.PositionId AS DocumentPositionId
	,H.thOriginator --Entry?
	,H.thOperator --Posted by?
FROM 
	@{item().ExchCode}.DETAILS AS L

	LEFT JOIN @{item().ExchCode}.DOCUMENT AS H
		ON H.thOurRef = L.tlOurRef
WHERE
	L.tlYear = '@{item().ExchequerYear}'
	AND L.tlGLCode >= 0
	--Exclude rows with 0 tlCurrency, but include 
	--those with 0 tlCurrency and tlGLCode 83050
	AND (
		L.tlCurrency != 0
		OR
			(
			L.tlCurrency = 0
			AND L.tlGLCode = 83050
			)
		OR
			(
			L.tlCurrency = 0
			AND L.tlGLCode = 83045
			)
		)

activities.name: Delete Current Year
activities.description: Runs the Procedure DeleteDetails$CompanyAndYear to delete the companies current year data that was collected in the previous activity

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    STG_Details.[ExchCompanyCode]
    ,STG_Details.[HomeID]
    ,STG_Details.[IntranetID]
    ,STG_Details.[Homename]
    ,STG_Details.[tlOurRef]
    ,STG_Details.thYourRef
    ,STG_Details.thLongYourRefTrans
    ,STG_Details.[tlFolioNum]
    ,STG_Details.[tlLineNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlRunNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlGLCode]
    ,NominalCodes.glName AS GL_Name
    ,STG_Details.[tlNominalMode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCurrency]
    ,CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate
    ,STG_Details.[tlYear]
    ,CompanyPeriods.[PeriodYear]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPeriod]
    ,CompanyPeriods.CalendarMonthLongName
    ,CalendarFullDescription
    ,STG_Details.[thCreationDate]
    ,STG_Details.[thPostedDate]
    ,STG_Details.[tlLineDate]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDepartment]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCostCentre]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDocType]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQty]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyMul]
    ,STG_Details.[tlNetValue]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDiscount]
    ,STG_Details.[tlVATCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlVATAmount]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPaymentCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlOldPBal]
    ,STG_Details.[tlRecStatus]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDiscFlag]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyWOFF]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyDel]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCost]
    ,STG_Details.[tlAcCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlItemNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDescription]
    ,STG_Details.[tlJobCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlAnalysisCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPreviousBalance]
    ,STG_Details.[DetailsPositionId]
    ,STG_Details.[DocumentPositionId]
    ,STG_Details.thOriginator
    ,STG_Details.thOperator

FROM 
    [Exchequer].[STG_Details]

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = STG_Details.ExchCompanyCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear = STG_Details.tlYear
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo = STG_Details.tlPeriod

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.NominalCodes
        ON NominalCodes.glCode = STG_Details.tlGLCode
        AND NominalCodes.ExchCompanyCode = STG_Details.ExchCompanyCode
ORDER BY
    [STG_Details].tlYear ASC,
    [STG_Details].tlPeriod ASC,
    [STG_Details].ExchCompanyCode ASC

properties.description: The Details (Ledger) from Exchequer for the previous financial Year

activities.name: Company List and Previous Year
activities.description: List company codes and the previous year, used to refresh the details data for the previous financial year BEFORE running the Current Fin Year

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @Today AS DATE = GETDATE()
DECLARE @PreviousYear AS DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,@Today)), MONTH(@Today), 1)

SELECT 
	HomeID, 
    IntranetID,
	Homename, 
	ExchCode,
    CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo,
    CompanyPeriods.CalendarFullDescription
FROM 
	Avery.HomeDetails

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = HomeDetails.ExchCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate = @PreviousYear
WHERE
	ExchCode IS NOT NULL
	AND ExchCode != 'KETT01' --Doesnt exist in Exchequer
ORDER BY
	HomeId ASC

properties.description: The Details (Ledger) from Exchequer for the current financial year, for any companies that failed in first run.

activities.name: Company List and current period
activities.description: List company codes and current period details for those that failed in the initial run, including the current exchequer year to be used in refreshing the details data

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @Today AS DATE = GETDATE()
DECLARE @CurrentPeriod AS DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(@Today), MONTH(@Today), 1)

SELECT 
	HomeID, 
    IntranetID,
	Homename, 
	ExchCode,
    CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo,
    CompanyPeriods.CalendarFullDescription,
    DetailsRetry.RowID AS RetryRowID
FROM 
	Exchequer.DetailsRetry
    
    INNER JOIN Avery.HomeDetails
        ON DetailsRetry.ExchCompanyCode = HomeDetails.ExchCode

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = HomeDetails.ExchCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate = @CurrentPeriod
WHERE
	DetailsRetry.Retried = 'FALSE'
    AND DetailsRetry.FinancialYear = 'Current'
    AND HomeDetails.ExchCode IS NOT NULL
	AND HomeDetails.ExchCode != 'KETT01' --Doesnt exist in Exchequer
ORDER BY
	HomeId ASC

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    STG_Details.[ExchCompanyCode]
    ,STG_Details.[HomeID]
    ,STG_Details.[IntranetID]
    ,STG_Details.[Homename]
    ,STG_Details.[tlOurRef]
    ,STG_Details.thYourRef
    ,STG_Details.thLongYourRefTrans
    ,STG_Details.[tlFolioNum]
    ,STG_Details.[tlLineNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlRunNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlGLCode]
    ,COALESCE(GeneralLedgerCategory.GLHistroyReport, RTRIM(GeneralLedgerCategory.GL_Name)) AS GL_Name
    ,STG_Details.[tlNominalMode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCurrency]
    ,CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate
    ,STG_Details.[tlYear]
    ,CompanyPeriods.[PeriodYear]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPeriod]
    ,CompanyPeriods.CalendarMonthLongName
    ,CalendarFullDescription
    ,STG_Details.[thCreationDate]
    ,STG_Details.[thPostedDate]
    ,STG_Details.[tlLineDate]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDepartment]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCostCentre]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDocType]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQty]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyMul]
    ,STG_Details.[tlNetValue]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDiscount]
    ,STG_Details.[tlVATCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlVATAmount]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPaymentCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlOldPBal]
    ,STG_Details.[tlRecStatus]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDiscFlag]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyWOFF]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyDel]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCost]
    ,STG_Details.[tlAcCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlItemNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDescription]
    ,STG_Details.[tlJobCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlAnalysisCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPreviousBalance]
    ,STG_Details.[DetailsPositionId]
    ,STG_Details.[DocumentPositionId]

FROM 
    [Exchequer].[STG_Details]

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = STG_Details.ExchCompanyCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear = STG_Details.tlYear
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo = STG_Details.tlPeriod

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.GeneralLedgerCategory 
        ON GeneralLedgerCategory.GL_CODE = STG_Details.tlGLCode
ORDER BY
    [STG_Details].tlYear ASC,
    [STG_Details].tlPeriod ASC,
    [STG_Details].ExchCompanyCode ASC

properties.description: The Details (Ledger) from Exchequer for the previous financial Year, for any companies that failed in first run.

activities.name: Company List and Previous Year
activities.description: List company codes and the previous year for those that failed in the initial run, used to refresh the details data for the previous financial year BEFORE running the Current Fin Year

source.sqlReaderQuery:
DECLARE @Today AS DATE = GETDATE()
DECLARE @PreviousYear AS DATE = DATEFROMPARTS(YEAR(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,@Today)), MONTH(@Today), 1)

SELECT 
	HomeID, 
    IntranetID,
	Homename, 
	ExchCode,
    CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodYear,
    CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo,
    CompanyPeriods.CalendarFullDescription,
    DetailsRetry.RowID AS RetryRowID
FROM 
	Exchequer.DetailsRetry
    
    INNER JOIN Avery.HomeDetails
        ON DetailsRetry.ExchCompanyCode = HomeDetails.ExchCode

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = HomeDetails.ExchCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate = @PreviousYear
WHERE
	DetailsRetry.Retried = 'FALSE'
    AND DetailsRetry.FinancialYear = 'Previous'
    AND HomeDetails.ExchCode IS NOT NULL
	AND HomeDetails.ExchCode != 'KETT01' --Doesnt exist in Exchequer
ORDER BY
	HomeId ASC

sqlReaderQuery.value:
SELECT
	'@{item().ExchCode}' AS ExchCompanyCode
	,'@{item().HomeID}' AS HomeID
	,'@{item().IntranetID}' AS IntranetID
	,'@{item().Homename}' AS Homename
	,L.[tlFolioNum]
	,L.[tlLineNo]
	,L.[tlRunNo]
	,L.[tlGLCode]
	,L.[tlNominalMode]
	,L.[tlCurrency]
	,L.[tlYear]
	,L.[tlPeriod]
	,L.[tlDepartment]
	,L.[tlCostCentre]
	,L.[tlDocType]
	,L.[tlQty]
	,L.[tlQtyMul]
	,L.[tlNetValue]
	,L.[tlDiscount]
	,L.[tlVATCode]
	,L.[tlVATAmount]
	,L.[tlPaymentCode]
	,L.[tlOldPBal]
	,L.[tlRecStatus]
	,L.[tlDiscFlag]
	,L.[tlQtyWOFF]
	,L.[tlQtyDel]
	,L.[tlCost]
	,L.[tlAcCode]
	,L.[tlLineDate]
	,L.[tlItemNo]
	,L.[tlDescription]
	,L.[tlJobCode]
	,L.[tlAnalysisCode]
	,L.[tlOurRef]
	,L.[tlPreviousBalance]
	,L.[PositionId] AS DetailsPositionId
	,H.thYourRef
	,H.thLongYourRefTrans
	,H.thOurRef
	,H.thPostedDate
	,H.thCreationDate
	,H.thDueDate
	,H.PositionId AS DocumentPositionId
	,H.thOriginator --Entry?
	,H.thOperator --Posted by?
FROM 
	@{item().ExchCode}.DETAILS AS L

	LEFT JOIN @{item().ExchCode}.DOCUMENT AS H
		ON H.thOurRef = L.tlOurRef
WHERE
	L.tlYear = '@{item().ExchequerYear}'
	--Exclude rows with 0 tlCurrency, but include 
	--those with 0 tlCurrency and tlGLCode 83050
	AND (
		L.tlCurrency != 0
		OR
			(
			L.tlCurrency = 0
			AND L.tlGLCode = 83050
			)
		OR
			(
			L.tlCurrency = 0
			AND L.tlGLCode = 83045
			)
		)

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
    STG_Details.[ExchCompanyCode]
    ,STG_Details.[HomeID]
    ,STG_Details.[IntranetID]
    ,STG_Details.[Homename]
    ,STG_Details.[tlOurRef]
    ,STG_Details.thYourRef
    ,STG_Details.thLongYourRefTrans
    ,STG_Details.[tlFolioNum]
    ,STG_Details.[tlLineNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlRunNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlGLCode]
    ,COALESCE(GeneralLedgerCategory.GLHistroyReport, RTRIM(GeneralLedgerCategory.GL_Name)) AS GL_Name
    ,STG_Details.[tlNominalMode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCurrency]
    ,CompanyPeriods.PeriodReportDate
    ,STG_Details.[tlYear]
    ,CompanyPeriods.[PeriodYear]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPeriod]
    ,CompanyPeriods.CalendarMonthLongName
    ,CalendarFullDescription
    ,STG_Details.[thCreationDate]
    ,STG_Details.[thPostedDate]
    ,STG_Details.[tlLineDate]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDepartment]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCostCentre]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDocType]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQty]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyMul]
    ,STG_Details.[tlNetValue]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDiscount]
    ,STG_Details.[tlVATCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlVATAmount]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPaymentCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlOldPBal]
    ,STG_Details.[tlRecStatus]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDiscFlag]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyWOFF]
    ,STG_Details.[tlQtyDel]
    ,STG_Details.[tlCost]
    ,STG_Details.[tlAcCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlItemNo]
    ,STG_Details.[tlDescription]
    ,STG_Details.[tlJobCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlAnalysisCode]
    ,STG_Details.[tlPreviousBalance]
    ,STG_Details.[DetailsPositionId]
    ,STG_Details.[DocumentPositionId]

FROM 
    [Exchequer].[STG_Details]

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.CompanyPeriods
        ON CompanyPeriods.ExchCompanyCode = STG_Details.ExchCompanyCode
        AND CompanyPeriods.ExchequerYear = STG_Details.tlYear
        AND CompanyPeriods.PeriodNo = STG_Details.tlPeriod

    LEFT JOIN Exchequer.GeneralLedgerCategory 
        ON GeneralLedgerCategory.GL_CODE = STG_Details.tlGLCode
ORDER BY
    [STG_Details].tlYear ASC,
    [STG_Details].tlPeriod ASC,
    [STG_Details].ExchCompanyCode ASC

properties.description: Copies the resident diary entries from CH to AH2 Transform

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
	Resident_Dy.RES_DY_REF,
	Resident_Dy.RES_REF,
	R.RES_CODE,
    ChSysDec.Description AS EntryType,
    CAST(Resident_Dy.Entry_Date AS DATE) AS EntryDate,
	CAST(Resident_Dy.Review_Date AS DATE) AS ReviewDate,
    replace(cast(Resident_Dy.Entry_Text as varchar(MAX)), char(13) + char(10), ' ') AS DiaryEntry,
    isnull(User_Hd.Name, '') AS EnteredBy
FROM 
    Resident_Dy (NOLOCK)
    
    LEFT JOIN Chsysdec (NOLOCK)
        ON Chsysdec.Decode_Ref = Resident_Dy.Entry_Type
        
    LEFT JOIN User_Hd (NOLOCK)
        ON User_Hd.User_Ref = Resident_Dy.User_Ref

	LEFT JOIN RESIDENT AS R (NOLOCK)
		ON R.RES_REF = Resident_Dy.RES_REF

SELECT 
[ADANAL_DEC]

      ,[ADMSN_TYPE]
      ,[ADM_REASON]

      ,[HOME]
      ,R.[HOME_REF]
      ,[LASTADDATE]
      ,[LASTDIDATE]
      ,[LOC_DESC]
      ,[LOC_REF]
      ,[MARKETING]
      ,[NINUMBER]
      ,[OCC_IGNORE]
      ,[ORES_REF]
      ,[ORIGADDATE]
      ,[POSTCODE]
      ,[RELIGION]
      ,[RESPAYINT]
      ,[RES_CODE]
      ,[RES_FNAME]
      ,[RES_REF]
      ,[RES_SNAME]
      ,[ROOM]
      ,[ROOMCAT]
      ,[ROOM_DESC]
      ,[ROOM_TYPE]
      ,[SEX]
      ,[STATUS]
      ,[TEL_NO1]
      ,[TEL_NO2]
      ,[TITLE]
      ,[USERDEF]
      ,[AUTHCODE]
      ,[DOUBLEINS]
      ,[FIRSTAWARE]
      ,[FIRSTVISIT]
      ,[REAL_FNAME]
      ,[REAL_SNAME]
      ,[REAL_TITLE]
      ,[SIGIND]
      ,[THIRDPARTY]
      ,[USERFIELD1]
      ,[USERFIELD2]
      ,[USERFIELD3]
      ,[NHSNUMBER]
      ,[ALTCOMMS]
      ,[ALTCOMMS_REF]
      ,[ASS_ACTBY]
      ,[ASS_ACTBY_REF]
      ,[ASS_ACTDT]
      ,[CONNECTION]
      ,[CONNECTIONDET]
      ,[CONNECTION_REF]
      ,[FUNDERREF]
      ,[LANGUAGE]
      ,[LANGUAGE_REF]
      ,[MOVEDINFROM]
      ,[MOVEDINFROM_REF]
      ,[PATIENTREF]
      ,[PICID]
      ,[PREVCODE]
  FROM [AHC_GRG_FBWIN].[dbo].[RESIDENT] AS R

  WHERE
	R.HOME_REF IN (@{variables('HOME_REF_LIST')}) --Home_ref List of homes being used in CH. Excludes any old ones being brought in
    AND RES_CODE NOT IN ('HH0048', 'HH0051', 'HH0055', 'HH0060', 'HH0063', 'HH0064', 'HH0066') --Orphaned records in GRG for residents not present in CH
  ORDER BY
	  R.RES_REF ASC

    ,R.[CreateDateTime]
    ,R.[HOME_REF]
    ,R.[OLOC_REF]

    ,[ROOM_CAT_DESC]

	[AHC_GRG_FBWIN].[dbo].[ROOMS] AS R
WHERE

ORDER BY 
	ROOM_REF ASC
